reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Hunter Williams — 2026-05-25 — 20-fat-loss-compounds-ranked-worst-to-best-no-glp-1s--55fd586f @ 19:06 — https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/20-fat-loss-compounds-ranked-worst-to-best-no-glp-1s--55fd586f/: "I would say the dosing, everyone should start with 250 micrograms or less, and then titrate up there." Hunter Williams — 2026-03-29 — cagrilintide-explained-the-next-big-peptide-for-fat-loss--9aacaef6 @ 19:59 — https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cagrilintide-explained-the-next-big-peptide-for-fat-loss--9aacaef6/: "If you're in a plato with your GOP one, I think absolutely before upping the dose, go to something like Cagri and see if can keep progressing."

And so I think it's just one of those things is kind of a coin flip, whether it is going to work for you or not."
- Hunter Williams — 2026-03-29 — cagrilintide-explained-the-next-big-peptide-for-fat-loss--9aacaef6 @ 13:29 — https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cagrilintide-explained-the-next-big-peptide-for-fat-loss--9aacaef6/: "I think at higher doses, but at lower doses there really was no nause or anything with me."

chronic.dose: Hunter Williams — 2025-02-11 — Cagrilintide (threadId 194f7321ecf3fdae): "Begin at 0.25 mg per week for a mild appetite-suppression effect. Adjust gradually based on tolerance." Hunter Williams — 2025-07-29 — New Cagrilintide Studies Out (threadId 1985855730c4a97f) — https://huntershealthhacks.beehiiv.com/p/new-cagrilintide-studies-out-79070e625a312fd4: "Begin by injecting 0.25mg (10 units) subcutaneously, 2-3 times per week." Hunter Williams — 2026-03-29 — cagrilintide-explained-the-next-big-peptide-for-fat-loss--9aacaef6 @ 8:19 — https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cagrilintide-explained-the-next-big-peptide-for-fat-loss--9aacaef6/: "Nova Nordis trial suggests that 2.4 to 4.5 milligrams per week provides optimal weight loss effects while balancing the side effects." Hunter Williams — 2026-03-29 — cagrilintide-explained-the-next-big-peptide-for-fat-loss--9aacaef6 @ 17:16 — https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cagrilintide-explained-the-next-big-peptide-for-fat-loss--9aacaef6/: "I think category, I'm going say start at 0.25 milligrams per week, and then you can tighten it up to 2.5 to 4.50 milligrams." Hunter Williams — 2026-05-25 — 20-fat-loss-compounds-ranked-worst-to-best-no-glp-1s--55fd586f @ 19:06 — https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/20-fat-loss-compounds-ranked-worst-to-best-no-glp-1s--55fd586f/: "Some people need to get up to three to four milligrams before they really notice the appetite suppression. But for me, if I take 250 to 500 micro grams per week, It is perfect."

structured_regimens.quote: Begin at 0.25 mg per week for a mild appetite-suppression effect. Adjust gradually based on tolerance.

structured_regimens.quote: Begin by injecting 0.25mg (10 units) subcutaneously, 2-3 times per week.
